evidence.snippet: Real ISR. Real targets. Processed entirely at the edge. Milliseconds. Not seconds.
Purpose built for SWaP-constrained unmanned systems & OEMs

Designed for 1-2 video feeds running multiple AI algorithms in near real time.
Suited for airborne, ground, and submersible applications, directly connected to a sensor or acting as a C4I node on a larger network.

items.notes: Core business is embedded AI video processing hardware (OEM boards) and software (AiTR, detection, tracking, image enhancement) for ISR missions on UAS/UGV/USV platforms at the edge.

products_categories.notes: Also advertises capabilities for loitering munitions, counter-UAS, and geospatial autonomy, but those are applications enabled by their ISR payload processors rather than distinct product categories.

evidence.snippet: Purpose built for SWaP-constrained unmanned systems & OEMs

The 1700-SOM, the key component of the 17xx-OEM platform, allows size-optimized integration onto customer-designed interface boards. The COTS System on Module (SOM) and OEM reference design support are provided to help customers integrate the SOM option.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells embedded video processing subsystems (OEM boards + integrated AI software) to drone OEMs and integrators for incorporation into ISR payloads on UAS, UGV, and USV platforms.

tagline: Edge AI video processing and target recognition for ISR, autonomous systems, and loitering munitions. Produces OEM processor boards (Qualcomm QCS7230, NXP ARM, NVIDIA-based) and AiTR detection/tracking software optimized for SWaP-constrained unmanned platforms. In production across multiple form factors from 14.7g ultra-compact to multi-feed systems. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public contract evidence sparse.
